$description: Linux / GTK4 + libadwaita overrides. No translucency stack on most compositors — we use solid fills and honor the libadwaita accent color preference (GNOME 47+). KDE (Qt) gets a separate override file in the future.

toolkit.$description: Which GUI stack the generator targets.

contextMenu.$description: libadwaita popover. Solid background + subtle shadow.

accent.$description: GNOME 47+ exposes org.gnome.desktop.interface accent-color. Pre-theme: follow system accent. Post-theme: brand.
